comment: Gift Guide page: assign this template to a page (Online Store > Pages > Theme template: gift-guide). Then pick products for the grid and the bundle product in the theme editor.

settings.top_tagline: Find the ideal gift for your loved ones.
settings.heading: The Gift Guide
settings.body_text: Discover Joy: Your Ultimate Holiday Gift Destination. Explore our curated selection and find the perfect gifts to delight your loved ones this holiday season.
settings.bottom_text: SUSTAINABLE, ETHICALLY MADE CLOTHES IN SIZES XXS TO 6XL
